title: Rewrite prompt for consistency
story: As a framework maintainer, I want roundtable-analyst.md rewritten into a behavior-first architecture so that Claude and Codex stay in the staged roundtable flow consistently.

title: State-local template binding
story: As a framework maintainer, I want template authority bound inline at each confirmation state so that templates can't drift from distant guidance.

title: Anti-shortcut contract
story: As a user invoking analyze, I want the roundtable to refuse shortcutting to artifacts so that I see the full discussion before confirmations.

title: First-class rendering modes
story: As a user, I want the three rendering modes treated as first-class presentation variants so that mode changes never weaken the roundtable protocol.

title: Persona extensibility via plugin model
story: As a persona author, I want to promote a persona to own a confirmation stage by editing only that persona's frontmatter so that my customization survives framework updates.

title: Appendix separation
story: As a framework maintainer, I want dormant/adapter content in labeled appendices so that the main execution path stays UX-contract-focused.

title: Prompt-verification test coverage
story: As a framework maintainer, I want 7 new prompt-verification tests so that rewrite regressions are caught in CI.

title: Hook runtime alignment
story: As a framework maintainer, I want hooks audited, updated, and extended so that the runtime enforcement matches the rewritten prompt contract.

title: bug-roundtable parallel rewrite
story: As a framework maintainer, I want bug-roundtable-analyst.md rewritten with the same architecture so that both prompts don't drift apart.

title: Documentation alignment
story: As a new persona author, I want updated docs explaining the persona extensibility model so that I can promote my first persona without reading source code.
